title: Fix SQL injection vulnerability
original_text: Fixed SQL injection vulnerability in database queries. Several queries were using string concatenation instead of parameterized queries. Replaced all raw SQL with parameterized queries using prepared statements. Added ORM layer to prevent direct SQL access. Implemented query builder for complex queries. Added input validation for all database parameters. Added tests for SQL injection prevention. Result: 47 tests pass.
expected_subject: fix(security): use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection
expected_body_lines: - Replace raw SQL with parameterized queries
- Add ORM layer to prevent direct SQL access
- Implement query builder for complex queries
- Add input validation for database parameters
- Add tests for SQL injection prevention
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(security): use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection"
